questionHtml:
What applies to DNA base sequences?

I. Some genes do not code for proteins.

II. Promoters are transcribed along with the gene.

III. Introns are only found within genes coding for proteins.

A. I only

B. II only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: What applies to DNA base sequences? I. Some genes do not code for proteins. II. Promoters are transcribed along with the gene. III. Introns are only found within genes coding for p
